research_note.summary: The admitted line-range-first locator pilot completed one DeepSeek V4 Pro non-streaming call on the approved second-source excerpt. The model returned parseable JSON with line-range locator candidates and did not emit character offset or quote-hash fields. Strict line-range review is still pending.
what_worked: DeepSeek V4 Pro with thinking disabled produced parseable compact JSON in one admitted line-range-first locator batch.
The output included the four expected top-level sections and three line-range locator candidates.
The model did not emit character offset fields, quote-hash fields, cryptographic hashes, or raw source text fields in the parsed JSON.
The committed records preserve provider/model, prompt/config, source-hash, token/cost, trace-storage, and line-range locator metadata without committing raw source or provider payloads.
what_failed: No method success is claimed; line-range support correctness was not evaluated by this boundary review.
Manual strict line-range review has not yet judged whether exact, approximate, broad, or missing labels are warranted by the local source.
Local character offsets and quote hashes were intentionally not computed in Goal 12C because the line ranges have not yet passed strict review.
The run intentionally omitted broad judgment abstraction and cross-method comparison prose, so those dimensions remain outside this artifact.
negative_results: A structurally complete line-range locator artifact is still proposal-only and does not validate trading claims or source interpretation quality.
Model-proposed line ranges are candidates until manually checked.
Deferred offsets and hashes preserve the Goal 12A/12B boundary but leave support validity unresolved until Goal 12D.
reusable_by_other_labs: Artifact payloads can carry lab-local line-range locator candidate metadata without changing protocol.
Use model_asked_to_emit_character_offsets=false and model_asked_to_emit_quote_hashes=false when separating model locator proposals from local verification.
A future strict line-range review can compute offsets and hashes only after accepting candidate line ranges.
do_not_repeat: Do not treat parseable JSON or line-range coordinates as method success before Goal 12D manual strict line-range review.
Do not ask the model to emit character offsets or cryptographic quote hashes in a line-range-first run.
Do not copy raw source text, raw model output, provider payloads, prompt traces, or generated synthesis metrics into currentness docs.
Do not substitute models or expand output contracts without a separate admission update.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
